## Checklist

- [ ] The file names are clear.
- [ ] The README or document explains the purpose.
- [ ] Required submission files are included if this is a submission.
- [ ] AI collaboration is recorded if relevant.
- [ ] Reflection / AAR is included if relevant.
- [ ] This is ready for peer or agent review.
